mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT r.role_code FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1

SELECT DISTINCT m.perm_code FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 AND m.perm_code IS NOT NULL AND m.perm_code != ''

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.sort_order
